flaggedZones.instruction: In this compressed dialogue run, add connective texture with occasional compound clauses or one reflective narration sentence carrying a semicolon instead of stacking isolated replies.

Break the short-answer chain by adding linked analytical or environmental clauses—prefer a semicolon joining related observations, or a compound sentence with ', and' / ', but' to keep motion without flattening cadence.

textureFindings.priorityInstruction: Semicolon usage is 0.3% against a 1.8% target, so the next texture pass should add a few paired-clause semicolons in analytical or settling beats before chasing any other metric.
